Over 120 years security experience 10,000 individual product lines Sterling LWH1W uPVC Window Handle Inline Universal Fitment The Sterling LWH1W uPVC locking window handle is a direct replacement for all uPVC window handles and has been endurance cycle tested and salt spray tested. It is corrosion resistant and features a push button release and locking button. With a 45mm spindle length, it fits all profiles.
